steps.sql: SELECT DISTINCT C."COLLECTIONID" AS collection_id, C."NAME" AS collection_name, C."CREATEDTIME" AS created_time FROM "dim_collection" AS C WHERE C."CREATEDBY" ILIKE '%download%'
